me.title: introduction
me.img_alt: Me sitting on the chair with curve desktop
me.git_content: I'm pretty solid with GitHub and working collaboratively on projects. And more, I am very active especially on Mondays! My preferred languages are Python, Java, and JavaScript, and an extensive amount of my work is proudly displayed on GitHub. I know everything that's necessary to know about GitHub and Git. I'm good at branching, merging, and resolving conflicts. I manage our projects using GitHub's features, such as issue tracking and project boards. Therefore, count me in for some intense coding sessions if you're searching for someone to collaborate with, especially on Mondays.

me.title: my story
me.content: When I was 13, I started to interest like how the computer works and what are the technologies. At that time, my mom bought me a laptop to learn what I interest and from that days, I have been learning without the ease of a day.
